en: Thus the heavens and the earth were finished, and all the host of them.
zh: 這樣，天地萬物都造齊了。

en: And on the seventh day God finished his work that he had done, and he rested on the seventh day from all his work that he had done.
zh: 第七日， 神完成了他所作的工；在第七日 神歇了他所作的一切工。

en: So God blessed the seventh day and made it holy, because on it God rested from all his work that he had done in creation.
zh: 神賜福第七日，把它分別為聖，因為在這一日， 神停了他一切所創造的工，歇息了。

en: These are the generations of the heavens and the earth when they were created, in the day that the LORD God made the earth and the heavens.
zh: 這是創造天地的起源：耶和華 神造天地的時候，

en: When no bush of the field was yet in the land and no small plant of the field had yet sprung up- for the LORD God had not caused it to rain on the land, and there was no man to work the ground,
zh: 原野上還沒有樹木，田間的蔬菜還沒有長起來，因為耶和華 神還沒有降雨在地上，也沒有人耕種土地；

en: and a mist was going up from the land and was watering the whole face of the ground-
zh: 不過有霧氣從地面上升，滋潤全地。

en: then the LORD God formed the man of dust from the ground and breathed into his nostrils the breath of life, and the man became a living creature.
zh: 耶和華 神用地上的塵土造成人形，把生氣吹進他的鼻孔裡，那人就成了有生命的活人，名叫亞當。

en: And the LORD God planted a garden in Eden, in the east, and there he put the man whom he had formed.
zh: 耶和華 神在東方的伊甸，栽了一個園子，把他所造的人放在那裡。

en: And out of the ground the LORD God made to spring up every tree that is pleasant to the sight and good for food. The tree of life was in the midst of the garden, and the tree of the knowledge of good and evil.
zh: 耶和華 神使各樣的樹從地上長起來，能悅人的眼目，也好作食物。園子中間又有生命樹，和知善惡樹。

en: A river flowed out of Eden to water the garden, and there it divided and became four rivers.
zh: 有一條河從伊甸流出來，灌溉那園子；從那裡分支，成了四道河的源頭。

en: The name of the first is the Pishon. It is the one that flowed around the whole land of Havilah, where there is gold.
zh: 第一道河名叫比遜，就是環繞哈腓拉全地的，在那裡有金子；

en: And the gold of that land is good; bdellium and onyx stone are there.
zh: 那地的金子是好的；在那裡也有紅玉和瑪瑙。

en: The name of the second river is the Gihon. It is the one that flowed around the whole land of Cush.
zh: 第二道河名叫基訓，就是環繞古實全地的。

en: And the name of the third river is the Tigris, which flows east of Assyria. And the fourth river is the Euphrates.
zh: 第三道河名叫底格里斯河 ，就是流向亞述東邊的。第四道河就是幼發拉底河 。

en: The LORD God took the man and put him in the garden of Eden to work it and keep it.
zh: 耶和華 神把那人安置在伊甸園裡，叫他耕種和看守那園子。

en: And the LORD God commanded the man, saying, "You may surely eat of every tree of the garden,
zh: 耶和華 神吩咐那人說：“園中各樣樹上的果子，你都可以吃；

en: but of the tree of the knowledge of good and evil you shall not eat, for in the day that you eat of it you shall surely die."
zh: 只是那知善惡樹的果子，你不可吃；因為你吃的時候，你必要死。”

en: Then the LORD God said, "It is not good that the man should be alone; I will make him a helper fit for him."
zh: 耶和華 神說：“那人獨居不好，我要為他造個和他相配的幫手。”

en: So out of the ground the LORD God formed every beast of the field and every bird of the heavens and brought them to the man to see what he would call them. And whatever the man called every living creature, that was its name.
zh: 耶和華 神用泥土造了野地的各樣野獸，和空中的各樣飛鳥，把牠們都帶到那人面前，看他給牠們叫甚麼名字；那人怎樣叫各樣有生命的活物，那就是牠的名字。

en: The man gave names to all livestock and to the birds of the heavens and to every beast of the field. But for Adam there was not found a helper fit for him.
zh: 那人就給各樣牲畜、空中的雀鳥，和野地的各樣走獸起了名字；只是那人沒有遇見一個和他相配的幫手。

en: So the LORD God caused a deep sleep to fall upon the man, and while he slept took one of his ribs and closed up its place with flesh.
zh: 耶和華 神使那人沉睡。他熟睡的時候，耶和華 神取了他的一根肋骨，又使肉在原處復合。

en: And the rib that the LORD God had taken from the man he made into a woman and brought her to the man.
zh: 然後，耶和華 神用從那人身上所取的肋骨，造了一個女人，帶她到那人面前。

en: Then the man said, "This at last is bone of my bones and flesh of my flesh; she shall be called Woman, because she was taken out of Man."
zh: 那人說： “這是我骨中的骨， 肉中的肉； 她當稱為女人， 因她是從男人身上取出來的。”

en: Therefore a man shall leave his father and his mother and hold fast to his wife, and they shall become one flesh.
zh: 因此人要離開父母，和妻子連合，二人成為一體。

en: And the man and his wife were both naked and were not ashamed.
zh: 那時，夫妻二人赤身露體，彼此都不覺得羞恥。
